sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60077" key="krokodili/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κροκο-δῑλίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑτ]</pron> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λόγος</foreign>), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a sophistic fallacy, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.93</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
